_comment: Trust policy for accelya-github-oidc-<learner> IAM role. Audience MUST be sts.amazonaws.com (default for aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4). Sub MUST be scoped to <owner>/<repo> — never wildcard the repo path. Consolidated to 2 statements to fit under IAM's 2048-byte trust policy quota.

Statement._why: One statement covers: module-11-* branches, capstone-* branches, :pull_request claims, and :environment:pr-* claims (the GH Environment-bound deploy/cleanup/integration-test jobs). Each pattern is repo-pinned — never matches another GitHub repo.
